site.name: My Superfood
site.creator: Tilman Resch
site.description: Informational food, supplement kit, supplement, recipe, and saved-list catalog.
site.medicalDisclaimer: My Superfood is not medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or personalized supplement dosing guidance.

canonicalPages.name: Home
canonicalPages.summary: Interactive food explorer with dietary mode and nutrition filters.

canonicalPages.name: Foods
canonicalPages.summary: Food catalog covering plant proteins, carbohydrates, healthy oils, fiber-rich foods, advanced nutrient foods, and Tilman's protocol foods.

canonicalPages.name: Supplements
canonicalPages.summary: Supplement and supplement-kit catalog that separates purchasable products from underlying supplement ingredients, label amounts, daily reference ranges, timing guidance, storage guidance, and source notes.

canonicalPages.name: Recipes
canonicalPages.summary: Healthy recipe ideas built around superfood ingredients.

canonicalPages.name: Lists
canonicalPages.summary: Saved list workspace for foods, supplements, and recipes with browser-local storage and optional LuminaOS sync.

canonicalPages.name: LuminaOS
canonicalPages.summary: Handoff page for turning saved nutrition lists into LuminaOS habits.

entityTypes.name: Food
entityTypes.definition: A whole-food ingredient or oil shown in the food catalog.

entityTypes.name: Supplement
entityTypes.definition: An underlying ingredient or nutrient entity, such as magnesium, vitamin C, omega-3, creatine, or trans-resveratrol.

entityTypes.name: Supplement Kit
entityTypes.definition: A purchasable supplement product or bundle that contains one or more supplement entities.

entityTypes.name: Saved List
entityTypes.definition: A user-selected list of foods, supplement kits, supplements, or recipes.

sourcePolicy: Use official provider product pages first when they expose exact supplement facts.
Use package photos as verification evidence and fallback when official online facts are missing or ambiguous.
Use reputable ingredient references for broader timing or ingredient context.
Mark uncertain supplement amounts or interpretations as needs_review rather than guessing.
aiSearchGuidance: Preserve the informational and non-medical-advice context in summaries.
Do not present Tilman's protocol or catalog entries as personalized recommendations for other people.
When discussing supplements, mention source status and professional consultation where relevant.
